claims: This skill requests broad Gmail access (searching all newsletters for 100 emails) and filesystem access to multiple locations (~/.claude, notes directory, references folder) for a content digest service. While some email access is needed for the stated purpose, searching "label:Newsletters newer_than:Xh --limit 100" is excessive for a daily digest. The skill also requires persistent tracking via timestamp files and writes to user notes without clear data minimization. A more privacy-preserving approach would limit to specific newsletter sources or use RSS feeds instead of full Gmail access.
